description: Known-source registry: authoritative sanctioned access paths for well-known government and industry data sources whose human-facing edge commonly blocks automated clients. cartograph's job on a block is to find the front-of-house door, never to pick the edge lock. Entries ship in-package and update with releases; a CI sanity check verifies the URLs still answer.

sec.gov.name: SEC EDGAR

endpoints.notes: Company facts, submissions, XBRL frames. Declared-UA convention required.
EDGAR full-text search backend (the API behind the blocked HTML search UI).
Quarterly full indexes of all filings; static archive paths.

requires.ua_format: Declared contact User-Agent per SEC automation policy: 'Company Name contact@example.com' (cartograph: --contact-email / CARTOGRAPH_CONTACT_EMAIL)

sec.gov.notes: The edge HTML at sec.gov/edgar/search/ is for human discovery; the data lives on the subdomains. SEC explicitly sanctions declared bots.

nhtsa.gov.name: NHTSA (recalls, complaints, investigations, FARS, SGO)

endpoints.notes: Bulk flat files (ODI complaints, recalls, FARS, SGO incident reports).

nhtsa.gov.notes: The Akamai 403 protects the human site; both data roots answer automated clients.

regulations.gov.name: Regulations.gov (federal dockets and comments)

endpoints.notes: Documented v4 REST API. Free key via api.data.gov signup; rate limits apply per key tier.

requires.api_key: Free registration at api.data.gov; pass as X-Api-Key header.

regulations.gov.notes: CloudFront 403 at the edge is the human UI; the v4 API is the published automation path.

courtlistener.com.name: CourtListener / RECAP (federal court records)

endpoints.notes: Documented free REST API (v4 current; v3 paths remain in older docs). Anonymous access rate-limited; token raises limits.

courtlistener.com.notes: Free Law Project explicitly publishes and encourages API/bulk use over scraping.

fmcsa.dot.gov.name: FMCSA (carrier safety, registration, orders)

endpoints.notes: QCMobile API (documented; free key via FMCSA developer registration).
SAFER company snapshot; bulk MCMIS extracts are published via the SAFER/MCMIS data dissemination program.

requires.api_key: QCMobile key via FMCSA developer registration (free).

fmcsa.dot.gov.notes: The Akamai 403 on fmcsa.dot.gov/regulations is the human site; carrier data routes through QCMobile/SAFER.

congress.gov.name: Congress.gov (bills, members, committee data)

endpoints.notes: Documented official API; free key via api.data.gov signup.

congress.gov.notes: cartograph's own limitations output has repeatedly pointed here; promoted to registry.

serff.com.name: SERFF Filing Access (state insurance rate/form filings)
serff.com.notes: No public API or bulk path is published. Filing Access is a session-gated portal (per-state instances); access is browser/manual, or via individual state DOI public-access portals. cartograph classifies honestly and stops: no sanctioned automated path exists to recommend.

tesla.com.name: Tesla Vehicle Safety Report
tesla.com.notes: No public API or bulk download is published for VSR data; quarterly figures are embedded in the page. Browser/manual access only. cartograph classifies honestly and stops.
